LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICTION. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING REQUIRED THE PARTIES TO APPEAR. THE COURT INFORMS THE PARTIES AT THE HEARING THAT ITS TENTATIVE RULING IS TO GRANT DEFENDANT'S MOTION. THE MATTER IS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED BY COUNSEL FOR BOTH SIDES. THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: SEAN KANE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED (302/RBU) ON 11/9/18 AND AFTER THE HEARING CONCLUDED, THE COURT ISSUES A FORMAL ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. (302/RBU)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLOSTER, STEPHEN TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FIRE DEPARTMENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE COURT HEREBY ENTERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND THE SAN FRANCISCO FIRE DEPARTMENT AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THIS ACTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62959800)

Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOHN HEMMING, ESQ. specially appearing via CourtCall for attoreny Ashwin V. Ladva of the Ladva Law Firm (Tel: 415-296-8844) on behalf of the plaintiff;
Deputy City Attorney ERIN KUKA of the OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY OF SAN FRANCISCO (Tel: 415-554-4229) appearing for the defendant City and County of San Francisco

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICTION.

The Court's tentative ruling required the parties to appear. The Court informs the parties at the hearing that its tentative ruling is to grant defendant's motion. The matter is argued and submitted by counsel for both sides. The Court takes the matter under submission. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported (302/RBU)

On 11/9/18 and after the hearing concluded, the Court issues a formal order granting Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Summary Judgment. (302/RBU)
